nasb.text: He did evil in the sight of the Lord, though not like his father and his mother; for he put away the sacred pillar of Baal which his father had made.

esv.text: He did what was evil in the sight of the Lord, though not like his father and mother, for he put away the pillar of Baal that his father had made.

cnv.text: 他行耶和華看為惡的事，只是還不至於像他的父親和母親一樣，因為他除去了他父親所做的巴力神柱。

ccb.text: 他做耶和华视为恶的事，不过没有他父母那么败坏，因为他除掉了他父亲立的巴力神柱。
